chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1831 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8292/2022 2. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for respondent states that the amount of roughly 60 million has already been recovered from the petitioner, fate thereof will be subject to proceedings already pending inter se before the forum of competent jurisdiction. Learned counsel further states that in addition thereto no further amount is demanded from the petitioner and any notice contrary thereto shall be withdrawn forthwith. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view of the foregoing, the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
